title: t_math_signed3 test doesn't work with -O0 option
body:
Running that test with the `-O0` option results in the following error:
```
%Error: t/t_math_signed3.v:44:  got='h0 exp='hf
%Error: t/t_math_signed3.v:44: Verilog $stop
Aborting...
```
It is not the only check that fails in this test. The others are in lines 47, 69 and 70.
code_blocks:
%Error: t/t_math_signed3.v:44:  got='h0 exp='hf
%Error: t/t_math_signed3.v:44: Verilog $stop
Aborting...
